title: Mushroom & Barley Soup
description: My Thermomix take on a Marco Pierre White-style mushroom barley soup — deep, earthy and nourishing.
keywords: Marco Pierre White inspired Thermomix recipe
intro: This is my independent Thermomix homage to Marco Pierre White and the comforting appeal of mushroom soup. It keeps the spirit of the original inspiration, but the method is written fresh for TM6 and TM7 cooks who want clear settings and a warm, achievable result.
steps: Chop onion, garlic and mushrooms 5 sec / speed 5. Add butter, sauté 5 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add the barley, stock and thyme. Cook 30 min / 100°C / Reverse / speed 1, MC off, until the barley is tender.
tips: Browning the mushrooms well is where the depth comes from.
A splash of soy adds savoury richness.

faq.a: Spelt or farro work; adjust the time to the packet.

faq.q: Is this the original Marco Pierre White recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Marco Pierre White and mushroom soup; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.
